title: cert-issuer Actuator input
description: Params for the cert-issuer Actuator (charter §2.3, ADR-0030): issue/renew/revoke against a Vault-compatible PKI CLM. The CLM token is NOT here — it is injected as a CredentialRef named 'cert-issuer' at pod spawn (§2.5). addr/role/etc. are non-secret.

serial.description: colon-hex serial: the cert to revoke (revoke) or supersede (renew)
